user.title: Tion
user.description: Enter your Tion / MagicAir cloud credentials.

error.client_rejected: Cloud rejected client_id/secret — Tion updated their mobile app. Capture fresh credentials (see tools/debug_auth.py).
error.grant_deprecated: Tion disabled password-grant (unsupported_grant_type). Auth must be migrated to OAuth code-flow with PKCE.
error.endpoint_gone: Endpoint api2.magicair.tion.ru is gone (404/410). Cloud moved to a new domain — check HA logs.
error.captcha: Cloud returned HTML (likely Cloudflare/captcha). Your IP may be blocked.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach api2.magicair.tion.ru. Check your internet/DNS.
error.unknown: Authentication failed for an unknown reason. See HA logs (enable DEBUG for custom_components.tion).
